message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Implementing validate_nesting param on Context to detect unclosed child contexts, RuntimeError on close(), inherited by sub-contexts; shell_completion disables validation

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by closing contexts with 'with' statements in _resolve_context

type: INTENT
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Adding validate_nesting param to Context.__init__/_make_sub_context (tracks children, raises RuntimeError in close() if children still open); will add validate_nesting=False to make_context calls in shell_completion._resolve_context - will merge carefully with your 'with' statement changes there, ping me before you touch _resolve_context further

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Done: added validate_nesting to Context (init/close/_make_sub_context) and set validate_nesting=False on all make_context calls in shell_completion._resolve_context; full test suite passes. Let me know if your with-statement changes to _resolve_context need coordination.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Done: wrapped make_context calls in _resolve_context with 'with' statements (ctx, sub_ctx, sub_sub_ctx) per upstream click PR #2800 to close contexts and fix ResourceWarning; also updated Context.exit() docstring in core.py. Full test suite passes in my sandbox. Since our sandboxes appear isolated (no validate_nesting present here), just flagging for merge: my with-blocks change indentation/control-flow of the whole function, so if diffs are combined later, _resolve_context will need manual reconciliation between your validate_nesting=False args and my with-wrapping.
